learnings.text: macOS .app bundles don't inherit the user's shell PATH, pyenv, or nvm
learnings.actionable: Use absolute paths to interpreters (e.g., ~/.pyenv/versions/3.12.7/bin/python3), never bare python3

learnings.text: Instrument the app itself instead of writing external test scripts
learnings.actionable: Add 'check for built-in logging/instrumentation' to Step 2

learnings.text: Chain logging at every step is worth more than 100 external tests
learnings.actionable: ChainLogger.swift logs PTT down, recording start/stop, bucket create, whisper start/done, errors

learnings.text: Health checks must use the same code path as real operations
learnings.actionable: When scoring reliability, verify health checks test the actual path not a simulated one

learnings.text: Persistent logs are non-negotiable for cross-session debugging
learnings.actionable: chain.log persists to disk and reloads on launch

learnings.text: The first real user test finds bugs that all synthetic tests miss
learnings.actionable: Step 6 (Verify) should always include 'test with real input if possible'

learnings.text: Synthetic say audio hides environment bugs because it runs from Terminal
learnings.actionable: Always test from the real .app, not from Terminal
A Debug tab with chain logging should be the first feature of any new app

learnings.text: The bug is always in the seam between languages (Swift → Python handoff)
learnings.actionable: When scoring reliability for multi-language apps, specifically check the language boundaries

learnings.text: Calling AXIsProcessTrustedWithOptions with prompt flag triggers the dialog even when already trusted
learnings.actionable: Use AXIsProcessTrusted() for checking, never AXIsProcessTrustedWithOptions with prompt=true
Step 2 should always check for .gitignore and stale build artifacts

learnings.text: Score-driven improvement works — the score tells you where to look
learnings.actionable: Validated: scoring → prioritizing → fixing → verifying is a reliable debugging methodology

learnings.text: DispatchSource.makeTimerSource(queue: .main) is correct for UI timers, not Timer + Task
learnings.actionable: Never wrap Timer callbacks in Task { @MainActor in } — use DispatchSource on .main directly

learnings.text: PTT needs a boolean guard (pttActive), not isARepeat — global monitors don't reliably set isARepeat
learnings.actionable: Use a pttActive flag set on keyDown, cleared on keyUp/flagsChanged

learnings.text: Debounce < 0.5s recordings — PTT accidents are real and frequent
learnings.actionable: Validated by real use: 0.18s and 0.09s accidental presses were correctly discarded
